message:
Add StatsDashboard and InsightCard transcript components

StatsDashboard:
- 6-stat responsive grid (duration, messages, tools, files, lines, tokens)
- Icon + color per stat type
- Staggered entrance animations
- Cost estimate for tokens

InsightCard:
- Type-based styling (key_decision, interesting_prompt, clever_solution, lesson_learned)
- Icon and color per type
- Click to navigate to message context

Closes jeffreysprompts.com-4x3, jeffreysprompts.com-lf6

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
